allow: Bash(for mod in prometheus canary circuit-breaker ratelimit healthcheck)
Bash(for mod in jwt healthcheck ratelimit redis circuit-breaker waf acme oidc graphql jsonschema transform consul cache-tags)
Bash(make -f project/nginz.makefile clean 2>&1 && zig build check-layout -Ddocker=true 2>&1)
Bash(make -f project/nginz.makefile clean 2>&1 && make -f project/nginz.makefile 2>&1 | tail -3)

Bash(gcc -o /tmp/check_sizes /tmp/check_sizes.c \\
  -I submodules/nginx/src/core \\
  -I submodules/nginx/src/event \\
  -I submodules/nginx/src/event/quic \\
  -I submodules/nginx/src/event/modules \\
  -I submodules/nginx/src/http \\
  -I submodules/nginx/src/http/modules \\
  -I submodules/nginx/src/http/v2 \\
  -I submodules/nginx/src/http/v3 \\
  -I submodules/nginx/src/os/unix \\
  -I submodules/nginx/objs \\
  -include ngx_config.h \\
  -DNGX_PREFIX=\\"/tmp/\\" \\
  2>&1 && /tmp/check_sizes)

Bash(sed -i 's/offsetof\(ngx_http_upstream_t, store\)/0/' /tmp/check_sizes.c && gcc -o /tmp/check_sizes /tmp/check_sizes.c \\
  -I submodules/nginx/src/core \\
  -I submodules/nginx/src/event \\
  -I submodules/nginx/src/event/quic \\
  -I submodules/nginx/src/event/modules \\
  -I submodules/nginx/src/http \\
  -I submodules/nginx/src/http/modules \\
  -I submodules/nginx/src/http/v2 \\
  -I submodules/nginx/src/http/v3 \\
  -I submodules/nginx/src/os/unix \\
  -I submodules/nginx/objs \\
  -include ngx_config.h \\
  -DNGX_PREFIX=\\"/tmp/\\" \\
  2>&1 && /tmp/check_sizes)
